decomposition_rules.granularity: 15-60 minutes Claude execution time per task
Atomic file set (2-3 tasks max per plan)

orchestration_patterns.state_tracking: Atomic git commits per task; Centralized state tracking (originally STATE.md, adapted to Redis+Supabase); Phase-level SUMMARY.md for rollups

failure_handling.auto_fix: 3 attempts per task for bugs/missing features
failure_handling.gates: Authentication errors treated as human-action gates (not failures)
failure_handling.stops: Architectural changes require stop & human decision
failure_handling.deferral: Out-of-scope issues logged to deferred-items.md (not fixed inline)

resource_allocation.concurrency: Wave-based execution (tasks in same wave run in parallel if supported, otherwise sequential)
resource_allocation.agent_lifecycle: Fresh agent spawning for context reset after checkpoints

mechanisms: Codebase Mapping: Pre-compute specialized docs (STACK.md, ARCHITECTURE.md) to avoid raw reads
Just-In-Time Loading: Agents load only relevant mapped docs based on phase type (e.g., UI phase loads CONVENTIONS.md)
Quality Curve Monitoring: Target <50% context usage for peak performance; >70% considered poor
Prompt Engineering: Plans are executable prompts, not documents

n8n_adaptations: Planner Logic -> n8n AI Agent Node (Reasoning): Implements the breakdown algorithm and wave assignment
Executor Logic -> n8n AI Agent Node (Tools): Implements the auto-fix loop, tool execution, and deviation handling
State Management -> Redis (Hot State) + Supabase (Persistent Logs): Replaces local STATE.md/SUMMARY.md; Supabase stores the 'Plan' and 'Task' entities
Wave Orchestration -> n8n Loop/Queue: Manages parallel execution of tasks in the same wave
Context Mapper -> Scheduled n8n Workflow: Periodically scans repo (via Docker volume) and updates context documents in Supabase/Vector Store
Git Operations -> Shell Command Node (Docker Volume): Direct file manipulation on mounted volumes; Git commits mirror task completion
Human Gates -> n8n Wait for Trigger / Form Node: Replaces 'checkpoint:human-*' tasks; sends notification to user for auth/decisions
